mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recruitment WHERE city = #{city} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM recruitment WHERE company_name = #{companyName} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM recruitment WHERE position_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{positionName}, '%') AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM recruitment WHERE salary_lower >= #{minSalary} AND salary_upper <= #{maxSalary} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruitment (position_name, company_name, experience_req, education_req, work_location, salary, salary_lower, salary_upper, avg_salary, job_description, company_welfare, company_scale, company_type, company_tags, skills_profession, skills_soft, city, district, province, publish_time, create_time, status) VALUES (#{positionName}, #{companyName}, #{experienceReq}, #{educationReq}, #{workLocation}, #{salary}, #{salaryLower}, #{salaryUpper}, #{avgSalary}, #{jobDescription}, #{companyWelfare}, #{companyScale}, #{companyType}, #{companyTags}, #{skillsProfession}, #{skillsSoft}, #{city}, #{district}, #{province}, #{publishTime}, NOW(), 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE recruitment SET position_name = #{positionName}, company_name = #{companyName}, salary_lower = #{salaryLower}, salary_upper = #{salaryUpper}, avg_salary = #{avgSalary}, update_time = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE recruitment SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recruitment WHERE status = 1 LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment WHERE status = 1
